client.name: Greener Grass Irrigation Repair, LLC
client.tagline: Repair It Right. Keep It Green.
client.description: Fort Worth's irrigation repair specialists — same-day service, licensed & insured, serving Tarrant County since 2011.

services.name: Irrigation System Repair
services.shortDesc: Fast diagnosis and repair of broken irrigation systems — valves, controllers, pipes, and heads.

services.name: Sprinkler Head Replacement
services.shortDesc: Replace worn, broken, or misaligned sprinkler heads to restore even coverage across your lawn.

services.name: System Installation
services.shortDesc: Complete in-ground irrigation system design and installation for residential and commercial properties.

services.name: Winterization & Blowout
services.shortDesc: Protect your system from freeze damage with a thorough compressed-air blowout before winter.

services.name: Spring System Startup
services.shortDesc: Full spring inspection, zone testing, and controller programming to get your system running right.

services.name: Backflow Testing & Repair
services.shortDesc: Licensed backflow preventer testing and repair to keep your water supply safe and code-compliant.

services.name: Drip Irrigation
services.shortDesc: Water-efficient drip systems for beds, shrubs, and gardens — designed and installed to spec.

services.name: Smart Controller Upgrades
services.shortDesc: Upgrade to a Wi-Fi smart controller for weather-based scheduling and remote app control.

services.name: Leak Detection & Repair
services.shortDesc: Locate and fix underground irrigation leaks before they become costly water waste.
